statement: In every magma, Equation 1351 (`x = y * (((z * x) * x) * z)`) implies Equation 2461 (`x = (x * ((y * x) * y)) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0365
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op (op z x) x) z))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op x (op (op y x) y)) z)
